posts.notes: The publisher dry-run passed, but the fact-check reports the cited 5,318 commits claim is 333 above the measured value and the draft does not carry the holding-company sharpen/incubate positioning. This post is not founder-post clear.

notes: This ledger covers Joshua public posts and public-share drafts, separately from zeststream.ai site-surface anti-pitch checks.
Publisher dry-run success is not enough: posts must carry holding-company positioning, receipt-led claims, fact-check pass/no-claims status, and human ratification gating.
Live distribution remains outside this ledger; this gate only records whether a post is voice/receipt clear.
